title: AWS: Zero to Cloud Architect
description: A complete AWS learning path from absolute beginner to cloud architect. Covers all major AWS certification tracks.

modules.title: What Is Cloud Computing?
modules.description: Learn what cloud computing is, why it exists, and how it compares to traditional on-premises infrastructure.

modules.title: AWS Global Infrastructure
modules.description: Understand how AWS is structured globally — regions, Availability Zones, edge locations, and how to choose where to run your workloads.

lessons.title: Lab: Explore the AWS Infrastructure Map

modules.title: AWS Pricing and Billing
modules.description: Understand how AWS pricing works, how to avoid surprise bills, and how to estimate and manage cloud costs.

lessons.title: On-Demand, Reserved, Spot, and Savings Plans
Lab: Set Up Billing Alerts and Explore Cost Explorer

modules.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
modules.description: Master AWS IAM — users, groups, roles, policies, and the principle of least privilege. The foundation of AWS security.

lessons.title: Lab: Create Users, Groups, and Policies

modules.title: Shared Responsibility Model and Compliance
modules.description: Understand what AWS is responsible for versus what you are responsible for, and how AWS meets major compliance frameworks.

modules.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework
modules.description: A survey of the six pillars of the Well-Architected Framework. This module is revisited in depth in Module 25.

modules.title: Compute: EC2
modules.description: Deep dive into Amazon EC2 — the backbone of AWS compute. Instance types, pricing models, storage, and networking.

lessons.title: Lab: Attach and Resize an EBS Volume
Lab: Launch and Connect to an EC2 Instance

modules.title: Scaling and Load Balancing
modules.description: Build highly available, scalable applications using Auto Scaling Groups and Elastic Load Balancing.

lessons.title: Lab: Build an ASG Behind an ALB

modules.title: Storage: S3
modules.description: Master Amazon S3 — from basic buckets and objects to storage classes, versioning, security, and static hosting.

lessons.title: S3 Storage Classes and Cost Optimization
S3 Security: Policies, Encryption, and Access Control
S3 Event Notifications and S3 Select
S3 Access Points and Multi-Region Access Points
Canvas Lab: S3 Lifecycle and Storage Tiers
Canvas Lab: S3 Static Website with CloudFront

modules.title: Storage: EBS, EFS, and Beyond
modules.description: Understand AWS block and file storage — EBS volume types, EFS for shared file systems, FSx, Storage Gateway, and AWS Backup.

lessons.title: EBS Deep Dive: Volume Types and Performance
EBS Snapshots and Data Lifecycle Manager
Amazon FSx: Purpose-Built Managed File Systems
AWS Storage Gateway: Hybrid Cloud Storage
Canvas Lab: Shared EFS Mount Across Multiple EC2 Instances

modules.title: Databases: RDS and Aurora
modules.description: Learn AWS managed relational databases — RDS engines, Multi-AZ, read replicas, and the Aurora architecture.

lessons.title: Aurora Advanced: Global Database, Parallel Query, and ML
RDS Proxy: Connection Pooling and IAM Auth
Canvas Lab: Highly Available RDS with Read Replica
Lab: Launch RDS and Connect from EC2

modules.title: Databases: DynamoDB and Beyond
modules.description: Master DynamoDB and learn when to choose other AWS database services — ElastiCache, Redshift, Neptune, and more.

lessons.title: DynamoDB Fundamentals: Tables, Items, and Keys
DynamoDB Global Tables and Single-Table Design
AWS Specialized Databases: Redshift, Neptune, and More
Canvas Lab: DynamoDB Table Design for an Order System
Lab: Create a DynamoDB Table and Query It

modules.title: Networking: VPC
modules.description: Build production-grade networks on AWS using VPC — subnets, routing, NAT, security groups, NACLs, endpoints, and Transit Gateway.

lessons.title: VPC Fundamentals: Your Private Network on AWS
VPC Endpoints: Private AWS Service Access
AWS Network Firewall and Traffic Inspection
VPC Design Patterns and Best Practices
Lab: Add a NAT Gateway and Test Egress
Canvas Lab: Build a Three-Tier VPC
Canvas Lab: Multi-VPC Peering and Route Configuration

modules.title: Networking: DNS, CDN, and Hybrid Connectivity
modules.description: Route traffic intelligently with Route 53, accelerate content delivery with CloudFront, and connect on-premises with Direct Connect and VPN.

lessons.title: Route 53 Fundamentals: Hosted Zones and Record Types
Amazon CloudFront: CDN and Edge Caching
AWS Outposts, Wavelength, and Local Zones
Lab: CloudFront in Front of an S3 Origin

modules.title: Security Services
modules.description: A deep dive into AWS security tooling — KMS, Secrets Manager, Shield, WAF, GuardDuty, Inspector, Macie, and Security Hub.

lessons.title: IAM Advanced: Policies, Roles, and Boundaries
AWS KMS: Key Management and Encryption
Secrets Manager and SSM Parameter Store
WAF, Shield Advanced, and Firewall Manager
Lab: Enable GuardDuty and Review Findings
Lab: KMS Key and S3 Encryption
Canvas Lab: Design a Secure Three-Tier Architecture
Canvas Lab: Spot the Security Gaps

modules.title: Monitoring, Logging, and Observability
modules.description: Monitor your AWS workloads with CloudWatch, audit with CloudTrail, enforce with Config, and trace with X-Ray.

lessons.title: CloudWatch Logs: Ingestion, Filtering, and Insights
Lab: Query CloudTrail with Logs Insights
Lab: Build a CloudWatch Dashboard and Alarm
Canvas Lab: Event-Driven Pipeline with EventBridge
Canvas Lab: Design a CloudWatch Observability Stack

modules.title: Serverless: Lambda and API Gateway
modules.description: Build serverless applications with AWS Lambda and expose them via API Gateway. Covers triggers, concurrency, cold starts, and authorizers.

lessons.title: Lambda Fundamentals: Functions, Triggers, and Runtimes
Lambda Advanced: VPC, Destinations, and Power Tuning
AWS SAM and Serverless Application Patterns
Lab: Wire Lambda to API Gateway
Canvas Lab: Order Processing with Step Functions

modules.title: Containers: ECS, EKS, and Fargate
modules.description: Run containerized workloads on AWS using ECS, EKS, and Fargate. Covers Docker basics, task definitions, and service deployments.

lessons.title: Containers on AWS: ECS, EKS, and Fargate
ECS Deep Dive: Tasks, Services, and Deployments
EKS Architecture: Nodes, Pods, and Networking
AWS App Runner and AWS Copilot
Lab: Deploy a Container to ECS Fargate
Canvas Lab: ECS Fargate Microservices Architecture

modules.title: Application Integration and Messaging
modules.description: Decouple your applications using SQS, SNS, EventBridge, and Step Functions. Build event-driven architectures on AWS.

lessons.title: Lab: Build an SQS + Lambda Pipeline with DLQ

modules.title: Developer Tools and CI/CD
modules.description: Build and automate delivery pipelines on AWS using CodeCommit, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, CodePipeline, CDK, and SAM.

lessons.title: Infrastructure as Code: CloudFormation and CDK
Canvas Lab: Full CI/CD Pipeline for ECS
Canvas Lab: Infrastructure as Code with CloudFormation
Lab: Build a CodePipeline to EC2

modules.title: Analytics and Data Engineering
modules.description: Process and analyze data at scale on AWS using Kinesis, Glue, Athena, EMR, Lake Formation, and QuickSight.

lessons.title: AWS Glue: Managed ETL and Data Integration
Canvas Lab: Data Lake and Analytics Pipeline
Lab: Catalog S3 with Glue and Query with Athena

modules.title: Machine Learning and AI Services
modules.description: Explore AWS ML and AI — SageMaker for custom models, and the suite of pre-built AI services and Amazon Bedrock foundation models.

lessons.title: Amazon Bedrock: Foundation Models and Generative AI
Amazon SageMaker: Custom ML Model Development
AI Services: Rekognition, Comprehend, Textract, and More
Canvas Lab: AI-Powered Document Processing Pipeline
Lab: Invoke a Bedrock Model via the Console

modules.title: High Availability and Disaster Recovery
modules.description: Design for failure. Understand RTO vs. RPO, the four DR strategies, and how to build multi-region active/active architectures.

lessons.title: AWS Resilience Hub and Chaos Engineering
Canvas Lab: Warm Standby DR Architecture

modules.title: Cost Optimization in Practice
modules.description: Stop overpaying. Right-size instances, leverage Spot, choose between Reserved and Savings Plans, and build a cost tagging strategy.

lessons.title: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, and Spot
AWS Cost Management Tools in Depth
Lab: Analyze Costs and Build a Savings Plan Recommendation

modules.title: Well-Architected Framework: Deep Dive
modules.description: A full pillar-by-pillar deep dive into the Well-Architected Framework — anti-patterns, lens reviews, and architectural decision records.

lessons.title: Architecture Patterns: Putting It All Together
